## npm install

added 113 packages, and audited 114 packages in 8s

12 packages are looking for funding
  run `npm fund` for details

found 0 vulnerabilities

## Chrome setup
Using system Chrome: /usr/bin/google-chrome

## npm run build:pdf

> obsidian-pdf-action@1.0.0 build:pdf
> node scripts/build-pdf.mjs notes.md dist/notes.pdf

HTML written to dist/notes.html
Using Chrome executable: /usr/bin/google-chrome
PDF written to dist/notes.pdf
